item.title: 'DO YOU BELIEVE IN THE 1st AMENDMENT?'
item.description: NYC mayor, Zohran Mamdani, tries to break through the state troopers to stop the mass deportations while shouting: 'DO YOU BELIEVE IN THE 1st AMENDMENT?' Raise your hand if you stand with Mamdani!✋?

item.title: Random Animal Dump #3

item.title: Troy is located in Turkey. Helen was always a woman of color
item.dc:creator: theSoulciologist

item.title: Tribute (To Animals And Those Who Surround Themselves With Animals)
item.description:
Where steel wool comes from? Actually it's protection from wolves. Starting to see these used a lot in Turkey and Austria due to increased wolf attacks.
The horns were starting to grow into it's skull. Kinda surprising they're just now trimming them.
There's a plan.
This Armenian village,Surenava, is famous for having a high concentration of storks that return annually. White storks build massive nests from sticks and twigs, often returning to the same site year after year to add more material. The birds frequently utilize human structures like utility poles and rooftops for nesting.
Farm kids, built different.
Satisfying
Robert Irwin, already a treasure. You did well, Steve. Rest well.
The real role model.
item.dc:creator: UnattendedDeviant

item.title: A little ADHD dump
item.description: I just wanna give a big shout out to this awesome community, you’ve really helped me on my little getting to know me journey with my ADHD. Whoever there is still struggling, feel free to shout out!

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1699 (oops! All intrusive thoughts.)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "beep" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: THATS MY MAYOR
item.description:
https://www.news.com.au/finance/real-estate/nyc-mayor-puts-landlords-on-notice-with-aggressive-crackdown/news-story/1e4d4d47786e573548be7aaf1d7b6ff7
A reminder that democrats ALWAYS could’ve been doing this, and there’s a reason it took a SOCIALIST to do the kinds of things he’s doing. If you haven’t put two and two together yet, idk what to tell you.
That’s my mayor!! (I live in Va)

item.title: Pixie & Brutus x Litterbox DUB! [OC]
item.description: The Pixie & Brutus crossover dubbed by the Litterbox Animated Pilot voice actors!! Sound very much ON! Every other panel drawn by pet_foolery on Instagram! https://www.instagram.com/pet_foolery/ VOICES Vincent: Brittney Karbowski Fran & Pixie: Brina Palencia Brutus: Parker Simmons The Litterbox Animated Pilot is coming along slow but steady! Join us on Discord http://litterbox.gg/ for the latest updates and be sure to sub to our YouTube to be there once the episode hits! https://www.youtube.com/@litterboxcomics
item.dc:creator: LitterboxComics

item.title: Hand to God- Police officer caught lying
item.description: Front page edit: To my knowledge, the court case for this was today, May 27th, 2026. The result being that the sighting officer request that charges be dropped. - .https://cbs12.com/news/local/florida-news-viral-tiktok-charges-dismissed-for-woman-without-right-hand-cited-for-holding-phone-while-driving-south-florida-texting-while-driving-wireless-communication-device Watch this police officer get caught lying red-handed. Remember kids, all cops are bastards.

item.title: 2026 has not been a good year for the Trans community.
item.description: Happy Early Pride, sorry I can't draw for shit, but I wanted this out in the world to express what being trans in 2026 feels like. The UK just declared what is basically a bathroom ban and indeed, a ban on transgender people entering certain places or organisations, with just one complaint being enough to shut of transgender people from services or organisations. Labour, the ruling party, full throatedly support this, as do Reform and the Tories. In Durham, their city council tried to stop their pride parade, with them specifically citing transgender people as a reason to remove funding. Luckily Trade Unions stepped in to help put it back on, but the fact the council tried to stop a pride parade over transgender people should show you where we are. Several smaller Parties tried making getting rid of trans rights the main focus of their campaigns in this year's elections and anti trans articles in newspapers average about 9 a day with minimal inclusion of trans voices and the prioritization of anti-trans groups. Even if you're not trans, we need to fight this, not just because it's the right thing to do, because transgender people are just the start for these people. They've used the same language against gay people in the past and they will go after the rest of the Initialism. Happy Pride. Be Gay, Do Crime.
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

8 Trafficators aka Semaphores came on a lot of early European cars, including early VW Beetles. Wikipedia https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Trafficators Also, the pickup probably has air-bags or hydraulics to raise it up to a better driving height.
9
10
11
12 Trachypithecus Geei aka Gee's Golden Langur
13
14 Bathypterois Phenax aka Rainbow Tripod Fish
15
16
17 Uncooked designer hotdog anyone?
18
19
20 Dude needs a cart.
21

item.title: Samson Beaver, his wife Leah, and daughter Frances Louise, 1907.
item.description: Carefully restored and colorized from an original historical photograph. ©olor by Sergey V. Rauzin, 2026 #digitalcolorization_by_sergey_rauzin #history #oldphotos #historicalmoment #vintage #retro #photorestore #colorizedhistory #photorestoration #colorization #Colorized #PhotoColorization #HistoryInColor #NativeAmerican #IndigenousHistory #HistoricalPhoto #VintagePortrait #OldPhotoRestoration #1907 #CulturalHeritage #HistoricPhotography #FamilyPortrait #OldWestHistory #ColorizedPhoto #PhotoRestoration #MuseumStyle #VintagePhoto #HistoricPortrait Original source/reference available here: https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Samson_Beaver_and_family_(2).jpg?utm_medium=organic&utm_source=yandexsmartcamera

item.title: GovBrief Today #481
item.description: Suzanne Swierc collected $225,000 from Ball State on Tuesday for being fired over a Charlie Kirk post, the third American in six days paid six figures after government retaliation for speech in the wake of his murder. Across four red states this year, government employers buckled to the loudest voices and have paid more than $2 million so far to settle the firings and the jailing. None of the posts were illegal or threatening. One was a prayer for Kirk's soul. Don't let MAGA officials and their supporters destroy lives over something as basic as freedom of speech. Find an event in your community at mobilize.us. I've emailed 7,567 stories over 481 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Free Subscription - https://gbounacos.substack.com Don't miss today's quote of the day, images, and data: https://go.govbrief.today/260526-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-may26 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-kenya [3] https://go.govbrief.today/kirk-payout-3 [4] https://go.govbrief.today/biden-sues [5] https://go.govbrief.today/ucla-sued-again [6] https://go.govbrief.today/splc-motion [7] https://go.govbrief.today/meta-scotus [8] https://go.govbrief.today/immigration-judges-scotus [9] https://go.govbrief.today/mpls-chief [10] https://go.govbrief.today/detention-suicides [11] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-reed [12] https://go.govbrief.today/paxton-cornyn [13] https://go.govbrief.today/nda-feds [14] https://go.govbrief.today/sc-senate Free Subscription - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
